items.title: Moscow rail hub explosion was suicide bomb, Russian officials say
items.description: A traffic police officer and the suspect were killed in the explosion, Russian officials say.

items.title: Robert Carradine, Lizzie McGuire and Revenge of the Nerds star, dies aged 71
items.description: His family says the actor took his own life after living with bipolar disorder for nearly two decades.

items.title: Probe under way after illness kills 72 tigers in Thai tourist park
items.description: Authorities say samples showed the canine distemper virus, but have not confirmed where it came from.

items.title: More than 5,000 flights cancelled as US east coast digs out of record snow
items.description: A major snowstorm dumps more than a foot of snow in several areas, bringing power cuts and disruption.

items.title: 'Anyone who runs is shot': Watch Russian soldiers describe killings of troops who refuse orders
items.description: The men, who are on the run, told of the horrors they witnessed on the Russian side of the front lines in Ukraine.
